ModMetaData.name: Music Expanded: Disco Elysium
ModMetaData.description:
If you're streaming, be warned you will be flagged because all of these songs are from the band Sea Power and are copyrighted.
Nobody on the Rimworld Workshop has made a mod for the soundtrack to one of the best RPGs in recent years, Disco Elysium. This corrects that mistake by placing it within the music expanded framework and will serve as a companion piece to another mod I made which is the soundtrack without needing the Music Expanded Framework because I don't want to make something that can only be used by the people who use another mod.
Also fuck ZA/UM for fucking over the creators of this game, stealing their company and ip, and then firing them for complaining about being couped. Support the artists not the art by pirating Disco Elysium the Final Cut from your choice of torrent sites and supporting Robert Kurvitz and Aleksander Rostov in their future endevors.
Tracks: Instrument of Surrender, Whirling-In-Rags, 8 AM, Detective Arriving on the Scene, Tiger King, Your Body Betrays Your Degeneracy, Precinct 41 Major Crime Unit, The Insulindian Miracle, Polyhedrons, Live With Me, The Field Autopsy, Miss Oranje Disco Dancer, Rue de Saint-Ghislaine 32B, The Doomed Commercial Area, The Cryptozoologists, Whirling-In-Rags, 8 PM, Disco Elysium, pt 1, Disco Elysium, pt. 2, 18 Ecstatic Vibrations, Totally Transcendent, Saint-Brune 1147 (Small Pinewood Church), Martinaise, Terminal B, We Are Not Checkmated, Hope in Work and Joy in Leisure, Burn, Baby, Burn, Whirling-In-Rags 12 PM, La Revacholiere, Krenel, Downwell, Somatosensor, Off We Go Into The Wild Pale Yonder, ZA/UM, Advesperascit, Ignus Nilsen Waltz .
ModMetaData.author: karbonpanzer
